Imagine being forced to leave your family forever. Imagine feeling alone every day. Layla had everything, then she lost it all. Her family disowned her. She drifted from city to city, working small jobs, feeling lost. She broke her fast alone during Ramadan, with no one to share the meal. Then one wrong turn changed everything. She saw children playing soccer with a deflated ball. They were barefoot. They were refugees. In that moment, Layla found her purpose. This is the story of how one wrong turn led to a school that changed hundreds of lives.
